raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-reflective boundary-setting that distinguishes internal subjective data from external factual claims",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "feelings constitute genuine informational signals about the speaker's internal condition",
    "feelings can systematically diverge from accurate representation of external states of affairs",
    "the speaker possesses the capacity to recognize and maintain this distinction"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; cleanly separates two distinct referents (internal state vs. world) without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker tends to treat emotional responses as direct evidence about external reality and benefits from a reminder of their partial reliability",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the distinction is interpreted as implying feelings carry zero epistemic value about the world or that internal states are wholly sealed off from external correspondence"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: self-reflective boundary-setting that distinguishes internal subjective data from external factual claims

feelings can systematically diverge from accurate representation of external states of affairs
the speaker possesses the capacity to recognize and maintain this distinction
